lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes. If you'd be so kind...

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: I hope that's what you wanted!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ohhh yes. Lovely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, nothing important.

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: Wait, you're a human, aren't you? Have you come from outside this town?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have.

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: Oh, how wonderful! Does that mean I can finally leave this place and see the world outside?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wouldn't your master have to take you?

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: The plagues mean that my master isn't allowed to leave. It's so boring here, and I'd like to travel.

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: My master has no interest in leaving. It's so boring here, and I'd like to travel.

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: Travelling's what camels do best, you know.

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: I don't suppose you could take me with you, could you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I know you're not ill as well?

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: Well, I haven't turned funny colours yet, so I'm probably not. Will you take me with you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't really have space for a camel, sorry.

lines.speaker: Neferti the Camel
lines.text: Oh well. Come back some time, and bring me news of the rest of the world.
